topic: The photos in my frames are swapped each night for the same people, a year older.
title: The Photos In My Frames Keep Aging | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Each night the photos in my frames swap for the same faces, a year older.
scenes.image_prompt: A row of framed family photos on a mantel, glass reflecting dim light, deep shadow behind, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I keep my whole family along the living room shelf.
scenes.image_prompt: A long shelf of framed photographs in a dim living room, soft lamp glow, dust in the air, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I dust those frames every Sunday.
scenes.image_prompt: A cloth wiping a photo frame on a shelf, warm side light, long shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning my mother looked older than the night before.
scenes.image_prompt: A single framed portrait of an older woman from behind the glass, faint reflection, dim light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then everyone aged a little more.
scenes.image_prompt: Several framed photos showing slightly older faces, soft focus, dim shelf light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I compared them to old albums in the drawer.
scenes.image_prompt: An open photo album beside framed pictures on a table, faded prints, low lamp light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The frames kept aging. The albums never changed.
scenes.image_prompt: A framed photo held next to an album page, the same face older in one, dim light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Soon the faces were gray and thin and tired.
scenes.image_prompt: Framed portraits of elderly figures on a dim mantel, glass glare, heavy shadow, grainy film, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My own photo joined them, aging fastest.
scenes.image_prompt: A framed self portrait among others showing an older worn face, dim shelf light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night every frame went black and empty.
scenes.image_prompt: A shelf of frames all containing only blackness, dim room, faint lamp glow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next day the obituaries listed each of them.
scenes.image_prompt: A folded newspaper obituary page on a table beside an empty frame, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Only my frame still ages, and it is nearly black.
scenes.image_prompt: A single dim self portrait frame on an empty shelf, the image fading to dark, low light, grain, vertical 9:16 framing
